Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''FoodNutrient.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Total entries:'', d.FoodNutrient.length\); const foodIds = new Set\(d.FoodNutrient.map\(x=>x.foodId\)\); const nutrientIds = new Set\(d.FoodNutrient.map\(x=>x.nutrientId\)\); console.log\(''Unique foodIds:'', foodIds.size\); console.log\(''Unique nutrientIds:'', nutrientIds.size\); console.log\(''Sample nutrientIds:'', [...nutrientIds].sort\(\(a,b\)=>a-b\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''food-calc/public/foodFull.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Total foods:'', d.length\); const withNutrients = d.filter\(f=>f.nutrients && f.nutrients.length > 0\); console.log\(''Foods with nutrients:'', withNutrients.length\); console.log\(''Foods without nutrients:'', d.length - withNutrients.length\); if\(withNutrients.length > 0\) { console.log\(''Sample nutrient entry:'', JSON.stringify\(withNutrients[0].nutrients[0]\)\); console.log\(''Nutrient count of first food:'', withNutrients[0].nutrients.length\); }")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''food-calc/public/foodFull.json'',''utf8''\)\); let totalNuts = 0; d.forEach\(f => { if\(f.nutrients\) totalNuts += f.nutrients.length; }\); console.log\(''Total nutrient entries in foodFull.json:'', totalNuts\); const withMany = d.filter\(f=>f.nutrients && f.nutrients.length > 5\); console.log\(''Foods with >5 nutrients:'', withMany.length\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''latest:'''', d.get\(''''dist-tags'''',{}\).get\(''''latest''''\)\); v=d.get\(''''versions'''',{}\); keys=list\(v.keys\(\)\); print\(''''recent versions:'''', keys[-10:]\); latest=d.get\(''''dist-tags'''',{}\).get\(''''latest''''\); lv=v.get\(latest,{}\); print\(''''deps:'''', json.dumps\(lv.get\(''''dependencies'''',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\(''''peerDeps:'''', json.dumps\(lv.get\(''''peerDependencies'''',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/food-catalog-lite.json'\); const names = d.map\(x => x.n\); const targets = ['апельсин', 'йогурт', 'хлеб', 'смузи', 'салат', 'суп', 'лапша', 'борщ', 'мёд', 'запеканка', 'овощи', 'кефир', 'сахар', 'шоколад', 'пельмени', 'плов', 'пицца', 'рыба', 'лосось', 'картошка']; for \(const t of targets\) { const hits = names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(t.toLowerCase\(\)\)\); console.log\(t.padEnd\(14\), '=>', hits.length, hits.slice\(0,3\).join\(' | '\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/food-catalog-lite.json'\); const names = d.map\(x => x.n\); const targets = ['мед', 'овсян', 'овес', 'молоко', 'колбас', 'сосиск', 'яйцо', 'масло', 'котлет', 'грудка', 'филе', 'орех', 'печень', 'морож', 'конфет', 'чай', 'вода', 'сок', 'тыкв', 'чеснок', 'лук']; for \(const t of targets\) { const hits = names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(t.toLowerCase\(\)\)\); console.log\(t.padEnd\(14\), '=>', hits.length, hits.slice\(0,3\).join\(' | '\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/food-catalog-lite.json', 'utf-8'\)\); const cheeses = data.filter\(item => item.n && /^сыр|,\\s*сыр|сыр\\s|сыр$/.test\(item.n.toLowerCase\(\)\)\); console.log\('Cheeses found:', cheeses.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cheeses, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const arr = require\('/c/Users/booty/Documents/GitHub/disher/apps/disher-backend-3.0/seed/combined-foods-final.json'\); console.log\('count:', arr.length\); console.log\('sample keys:', Object.keys\(arr[0]\)\); const sources = {}; const cats = new Set\(\); for \(const p of arr\) { sources[p.source] = \(sources[p.source]||0\)+1; for \(const c of p.categories||[]\) cats.add\(c\); } console.log\('sources:', sources\); console.log\('categories count:', cats.size\); console.log\('first 10 cats:', [...cats].slice\(0,10\)\); const noPortions = arr.filter\(p => !p.portions || p.portions.length === 0\).length; console.log\('without portions:', noPortions\); const noNutrients = arr.filter\(p => !p.nutrients || Object.keys\(p.nutrients\).length === 0\).length; console.log\('without nutrients:', noNutrients\);")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 1100 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $occ = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($occ\) { "still occupied: $\($occ.OwningProcess -join ','\)" } else { "port 3100 free" })

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "still busy" } else { "free" })

PowerShell($ports = 3000, 3100, 4173, 5173; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { foreach \($c in $conns\) { Write-Host \("Port {0} PID {1}" -f $p, $c.OwningProcess\) } } else { Write-Host \("Port {0}: free" -f $p\) } })

PowerShell($pids = 11968, 21604, 19500; foreach \($targetPid in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $targetPid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \("Killed PID {0}" -f $targetPid\) }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host "---"; $ports = 3000, 3100, 4173, 5173; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { Write-Host \("Port {0} STILL BUSY PID {1}" -f $p, $conns[0].OwningProcess\) } else { Write-Host \("Port {0}: free" -f $p\) } })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { foreach \($c in $conns\) { Write-Host \("Port 3100 PID {0}" -f $c.OwningProcess\); Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, StartTime | Format-List } } else { Write-Host "Port 3100: NOT listening" })

Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); const svg = fs.readFileSync\('public/logo.svg'\); const svgMask = fs.readFileSync\('public/logo-maskable.svg'\); Promise.all\([sharp\(svg, {density: 384}\).resize\(192, 192\).png\(\).toFile\('public/pwa-192x192.png'\), sharp\(svg, {density: 1024}\).resize\(512, 512\).png\(\).toFile\('public/pwa-512x512.png'\), sharp\(svgMask, {density: 1024}\).resize\(512, 512\).png\(\).toFile\('public/pwa-maskable-512x512.png'\), sharp\(svg, {density: 320}\).resize\(180, 180\).png\(\).toFile\('public/apple-touch-icon.png'\)]\).then\(\(\)=>console.log\('done'\)\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\)}\);")
